legion of excess.name: Beguiling Aura
legion of excess.effect: LEGIONES DAEMONICA SLAANESH units from your army are eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which they Fell Back.

scintillating legion.name: Fates in Flux
scintillating legion.timing: You start the battle with three Flux tokens (we recommend using a dice to track how many Flux tokens you have). You can spend one Flux token just after an Advance roll, Hit roll, Wound roll, Damage roll, saving throw or Hazardous test is made for a LEGIONES DAEMONICA TZEENTCH model or LEGIONES DAEMONICA TZEENTCH unit from your army to re-roll the result of that roll, throw or test. Flux tokens can also be spent to enhance the effect of some Stratagems. Each time you spend a Flux token, reduce the number of Flux tokens you have by one and your opponent gains one Flux token.
scintillating legion.effect: Whenever your opponent has one or more Flux tokens, they can spend one Flux token after an Advance roll, Hit roll, Wound roll or saving throw is made for a model or unit from their army, to re-roll the result of that roll or throw. If they do, they reduce the number of Flux tokens they have by one and you gain one Flux token. This is ignored if your opponent has the Fates in Flux Detachment rule.

details.label: Detalle 1
details.text: In your Command phase, if your opponent has one or more Flux tokens, you gain one Flux token.

details.label: Designer'S Note
details.text: Designer's Note: *When using fast dice rolling, this rule can be used to spend any number of Flux tokens (up to the amount you have), to re-roll a number of dice up to the amount spent, after rolling multiple rolls or saving throws at once.*

blood legion.name: Murdercall
blood legion.timing: Each time an enemy unit (excluding AIRCRAFT) ends a Normal or Advance move within 6" of one or more LEGIONES DAEMONICA KHORNE units from your army, one of those LEGIONES DAEMONICA KHORNE units can make a Surge move towards that enemy unit. To do so, roll one D6: models in your unit move a number of inches up to this result, but your unit must end that move as close as possible to that enemy unit. When doing so, those models can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit. A unit cannot make a Surge move while it is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
blood legion.effect: Each time an enemy unit (excluding AIRCRAFT) ends a Normal or Advance move within 6" of one or more LEGIONES DAEMONICA KHORNE units from your army, one of those LEGIONES DAEMONICA KHORNE units can make a Surge move towards that enemy unit. To do so, roll one D6: models in your unit move a number of inches up to this result, but your unit must end that move as close as possible to that enemy unit. When doing so, those models can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit. A unit cannot make a Surge move while it is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

plague legion.name: Melancholic Miasma
plague legion.timing: While an enemy unit is within 9" of one or more LEGIONES DAEMONICA NURGLE units from your army, that enemy unit is within your army's Shadow of Chaos. In each player's Command phase, select one enemy unit within your army's Shadow of Chaos. That unit must take a Battle-shock test.
plague legion.effect: While an enemy unit is within 9" of one or more LEGIONES DAEMONICA NURGLE units from your army, that enemy unit is within your army's Shadow of Chaos. In each player's Command phase, select one enemy unit within your army's Shadow of Chaos. That unit must take a Battle-shock test.

shadow legion.name: First Prince of Chaos
shadow legion.effect: Abilities for this Detachment are linked to the relevant units.

traitoris lance.name: Paragons of Terror
traitoris lance.timing: At the start of the first battle round, after selecting one or more Dread abilities to be active for your army, you can select one additional Dread ability to be active for your army (this additional Dread ability cannot be randomly selected).
traitoris lance.effect: At the start of the first battle round, after selecting one or more Dread abilities to be active for your army, you can select one additional Dread ability to be active for your army (this additional Dread ability cannot be randomly selected).

iconoclast fiefdom.name: Dreaded Masters
iconoclast fiefdom.timing: Dread Tyrants (Aura): While a friendly DAMNED unit is within 9" of this unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.
iconoclast fiefdom.effect: TITANIC CHAOS KNIGHTS units from your army have the following abilities:

details.label: Detalle 1
details.text: CHAOS KNIGHTS units from your army have the following abilities:

details.label: Dark Sacrifice
details.text: Dark Sacrifice: Each time a CHAOS KNIGHTS unit with this ability is selected to shoot or fight, it can make a Dark Sacrifice. If it does, select one friendly DAMNED unit within 6". That DAMNED unit must take a Leadership test: if passed, destroy D3 models in that DAMNED unit; if failed, destroy D3+3 models in that DAMNED unit. In either case, then select one of the following abilities for your Chaos Knights unit's weapons to have until the end of the phase: [LETHAL HITS]; [SUSTAINED HITS 1].

lords of dread.name: Tyrannical Court
lords of dread.timing: Improve the Objective Control characteristic of Chaos Knight Character models from your army by 2. In addition, once per battle round, if your Warlord is on the battlefield, you can use the Claimed for the Dark Gods Stratagem for 0CP.
lords of dread.effect: Improve the Objective Control characteristic of Chaos Knight Character models from your army by 2. In addition, once per battle round, if your Warlord is on the battlefield, you can use the Claimed for the Dark Gods Stratagem for 0CP.

houndpack lance.name: Marked Prey
houndpack lance.timing: At the start of your Command phase, select one unit from your opponent's army. Until the start of your next Command phase, each time a War Dog model from your army makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, if that unit is visible to the attacking model, that attack has the [Sustained Hits 1] ability.
houndpack lance.effect: While using the Houndpack Lance Detachment, the following rules apply:

details.label: Detalle 1
details.text: Your army must include 3 or more War Dog units.

details.label: Detalle 2
details.text: War Dog units from your army have the Battleline keyword.

details.label: Detalle 3
details.text: When mustering your army, select 3 War Dog units from your army. Until the end of the battle, those units have the Character keyword.*

details.label: * Designer'S Note
details.text: * Designer's Note: *This means that the selected units can be given Enhancements and one of them can be selected as your* Warlord.

infernal lance.name: Malefic Surge
infernal lance.timing: In your Command phase, one or more Chaos Knights units from your army can make a Malefic Surge. Each one that does must first take a Leadership test; if that test is failed, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds. Then, until the start of your next Command phase, that unit is Empowered. While a unit is Empowered, it can use one of the Malefic Surge abilities below. Once that unit has used a Malefic Surge ability, it is no longer Empowered.
infernal lance.effect: Unholy Hunger: When a model in this unit makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, until the end of the phase, add 3" to its Move characteristic.

details.label: Diabolic Power
details.text: Diabolic Power: When this unit is selected to shoot or fight, select either the [Lethal Hits] or [Sustained Hits 1] ability. Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in this unit have the selected ability.

details.label: Unnatural Fortitude
details.text: Unnatural Fortitude: When this unit is selected as the target of an attack, until the end of the phase, select one of the following:

details.label: Detalle 3
details.text: Models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save

details.label: Detalle 4
details.text: Models in this unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability.

helhunt lance.name: Masters of the Pack
helhunt lance.timing: If a Titanic Chaos Knights unit from your army has an Aura ability that affects friendly War Dog units, while two or more friendly War Dog models are within range of that Titanic Chaos Knights unit's Aura ability, that Titanic Chaos Knights unit is affected by that Aura ability as well.
helhunt lance.effect: If a Titanic Chaos Knights unit from your army has an Aura ability that affects friendly War Dog units, while two or more friendly War Dog models are within range of that Titanic Chaos Knights unit's Aura ability, that Titanic Chaos Knights unit is affected by that Aura ability as well.

pactbound zealots.name: Marks of Chaos
pactbound zealots.timing: When mustering your army, when you select a Heretic Astartes unit to include in your army, if that unit is not an Epic Hero and does not already have one of the following keywords, you must select one for that unit to gain and note it on your Army Roster: Khorne, Tzeentch, Nurgle, Slaanesh, Chaos Undivided.
pactbound zealots.effect: Each time a unit with one of these keywords gains a weapon ability as the result of a Dark Pact and does not fail the resulting Leadership test, until the end of the phase, that unit gains the associated ability below.

details.label: Detalle 1
details.text: RESTRICTIONS

details.label: Detalle 2
details.text: You cannot select the Khorne keyword for a Psyker unit.

details.label: Detalle 3
details.text: A Character unit can only be attached to a unit if both units share the same keyword from the list below.

details.label: Detalle 4
details.text: A unit can only embark within (or start the battle embarked within) a Transport if both of those units share the same keyword from the list above.'

veterans of the long war.name: Focus of Hatred
veterans of the long war.timing: At the start of your Command phase, select one unit from your opponent's army to be your focus of hatred. Until the start of your next Command phase, each time a Heretic Astartes model from your army (excluding Damned models) makes an attack that targets your focus of hatred, you can re-roll the Hit roll.
veterans of the long war.effect: At the start of your Command phase, select one unit from your opponent's army to be your focus of hatred. Until the start of your next Command phase, each time a Heretic Astartes model from your army (excluding Damned models) makes an attack that targets your focus of hatred, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

deceptors.name: Masters of Misdirection
deceptors.effect: In the Declare Battle Formations step, you can select a number of Legionaries and Cultist Mob units from your army; until the end of the battle, those units, and any Character units attached to them (excluding Epic Heroes), have the Infiltrator ability. The maximum number of units you can select in this way depends on the battle size, as shown below.

details.label: Detalle 1
details.text: Battle Size | Legionaries | Cultist Mobs

details.label: Detalle 2
details.text: Incursion | Up to 2 units | Up to 2 units

details.label: Detalle 3
details.text: Strike Force | Up to 3 units | Up to 3 units

details.label: Detalle 4
details.text: Onslaught | Up to 4 units | Up to 4 units

renegade raiders.name: Raiders and Reavers
renegade raiders.timing: Ranged weapons equipped by Heretic Astartes models from your army have the [ASSAULT] ability, and each time a Heretic Astartes model from your army makes an attack that targets a unit within range of an objective marker, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.
renegade raiders.effect: Ranged weapons equipped by Heretic Astartes models from your army have the [ASSAULT] ability, and each time a Heretic Astartes model from your army makes an attack that targets a unit within range of an objective marker, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

dread talons.name: Terror Descends (Aura)
dread talons.timing: Each time an enemy unit within 12" of one or more Heretic Astartes units from your army takes a Battle-shock test, subtract 1 from the result.
dread talons.effect: In the Battle-shock step of your opponent's Command phase, if an enemy unit that is below its Starting Strength is within 12" of one or more Heretic Astartes units from your army, that enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

details.label: Detalle 1
details.text: Enemy units affected by this Detachment rule do not need to take any other Battle-shock tests in the same phase.

fellhammer siege host.name: Iron Fortitude
fellhammer siege host.timing: Each time a ranged attack targets a Heretic Astartes unit from your army (excluding Damned units), if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of that unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.
fellhammer siege host.effect: Each time a ranged attack targets a Heretic Astartes unit from your army (excluding Damned units), if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of that unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

chaos cult.name: Desperate Devotion
chaos cult.timing: Each time a Damned unit from your army with the Dark Pacts ability is selected to make a Normal or Advance move or declare a charge (excluding units that arrived from Reserves this turn) it can make a Desperate Pact. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 2" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit and add 2 to Charge rolls made for that unit.

details.label: Detalle 1
details.text: Each time a unit makes a Desperate Pact, it must first take a Leadership test; if that test is failed, the unit suffers D3 mortal wounds before any effects of the Desperate Pact are resolved.

soulforged warpack.name: Debt to the Soulforge
soulforged warpack.timing: Each time a Heretic Astartes Daemon Vehicle model from your army makes a Dark Pact, it can invoke its contract. If it does, subtract 1 from the resulting Leadership test when making that Dark Pact and, until the end of the phase:
soulforged warpack.effect: Each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

details.label: Detalle 1
details.text: Add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in that unit.

creations of bile.name: Creations of Bile
creations of bile.timing: At the start of the battle, select which augmentations are active for Heretic Astartes Infantry models (excluding Damned models) from your army until the end of the battle. To do so, either select one from the list below, or randomly determine two by rolling two D6. If Fabius Bile is your Warlord, when randomly determining your augmentations, you can re-roll one or both of the dice. Duplicated augmentations have no additional effect.
creations of bile.effect: Cholinergic Accelerants: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model.

details.label: Hyperadrenal Infusion
details.text: Hyperadrenal Infusion: Add 2" to the Move characteristic of this model.

details.label: Paraneural Reactions
details.text: Paraneural Reactions: Improve the Weapon Skill characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model by 1.

details.label: Supracutaneous Chitination
details.text: Supracutaneous Chitination: Improve the Toughness characteristic of this model by 1.

details.label: Macrotensile Sinews
details.text: Macrotensile Sinews: Add 1 to the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model.

details.label: Ophthalmic Enhancement
details.text: Ophthalmic Enhancement: Improve the Ballistic Skill characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by this model by 1.

cabal of chaos.name: Empyric Wellspring
cabal of chaos.timing: Each time a unit from your army makes a Dark Pact, select one of the following abilities. Your unit has that ability until the end of the phase.

details.label: Detalle 1
details.text: While this unit is within 9" of one or more friendly Heretic Astartes Psyker models, improve the Strength characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit by 1.

details.label: Detalle 2
details.text: Monstrous Manifestation

details.label: Detalle 3
details.text: While this unit is within 9" of one or more friendly Heretic Astartes Daemon Prince or Heretic Astartes Daemon Prince with Wings models, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in this unit by 1.

nightmare hunt.name: Terror Made Manifest
nightmare hunt.timing: Each time a Heretic Astartes model from your army makes an attack that targets a unit that is Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Hit roll.
nightmare hunt.effect: In the Battle-shock step of your opponent's Command phase, if an enemy unit that is below its Starting Strength is within 12" of one or more Heretic Astartes units from your army, that enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from the result. Enemy units affected by this Detachment rule do not need to take any other Battle-shock tests in the same phase.

details.label: Detalle 1
details.text: Each time an attack targets a Heretic Astartes unit from your army, if the attacking model is Battle-shocked, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

details.label: Detalle 2
details.text: Each time a Heretic Astartes model from your army makes an attack that targets a Battle-shocked unit, add 1 to the Wound roll.

hurons marauders.name: Tyrannical Motivation
hurons marauders.timing: In your Command phase, select one of the following abilities. Until the start of your next Command phase, each Heretic Astartes Infantry unit from your army has that ability. At the start of each phase, if such a unit is visible to a friendly Huron Blackheart model, until the end of the phase, it has both of the following abilities.

details.label: Detalle 1
details.text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

details.label: Detalle 2
details.text: Mobile Marauders

details.label: Detalle 3
details.text: This unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

details.label: *Designer'S Note
details.text: *Designer's Note: If a unit is gaining eligibility to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back as a result of being visible to Huron Blackheart, but after making a Fall Back move it is no longer visible to Huron Blackheart, that unit will not be eligible to shoot in your Shooting phase or to declare a charge in your Charge phase unless it is visible again at the start of the respective phase.*

renegade warband.name: Slaves to None
renegade warband.timing: When mustering your army, you cannot use the Cults of the Dark Gods rule.
renegade warband.effect: Heretic Astartes models from your army lose the Dark Pacts ability. Ranged weapons equipped by Heretic Astartes models from your army have the [ASSAULT] ability.

warpstrike champions.name: Warp Portals
warpstrike champions.effect: At the end of your opponent's turn, you can select a number of Heretic Astartes Terminator, Obliterators and Mutilators units from your army (excluding units that are within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units). The maximum number of units you can select depends on the battle size, as follows:

details.label: Detalle 1
details.text: Incursion

details.label: Detalle 2
details.text: Up to 1 unit

details.label: Detalle 3
details.text: Strike Force

details.label: Detalle 4
details.text: Up to 2 units

details.label: Detalle 5
details.text: Onslaught

details.label: Detalle 6
details.text: Up to 3 units

details.label: Detalle 7
details.text: Once you have made your selections, remove those units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves.

cult of the arkifane.name: Soul Forge Boons
cult of the arkifane.effect: Heretic Astartes Vehicle units from your army gain the Daemon keyword.

details.label: Detalle 1
details.text: Heretic Astartes Vehicle, Lord Discordant and Vashtorr the Arkifane units from your army gain the Soul Forge keyword.

details.label: Detalle 2
details.text: Soul Forge units from your army have a 5+ invulnerable save.

flyblown host.name: Verminous Haze
flyblown host.effect: Death Guard Infantry units (excluding Poxwalkers units) from your army that are not embarked within a Transport have the Scouts 5" and Stealth abilities.

virulent vectorium.name: Worldblight
virulent vectorium.effect: If you control an objective marker at the end of your Command phase and a Death Guard unit from your army (excluding Battle-shocked units) is within range of that objective marker, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent's Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase. In addition, until you lose control of that objective marker, it has the Nurgle's Gift ability as if it were a Death Guard unit from your army.

shamblerot vectorium.name: Numberless Horde
shamblerot vectorium.timing: In your Command phase in each of the following battle rounds, depending on your chosen battle size, add a new Poxwalkers unit with a Starting Strength of 10 to your army, in Strategic Reserves.

details.label: Detalle 1
details.text: Battle Rounds 2,3

details.label: Detalle 2
details.text: Strike Force

details.label: Detalle 3
details.text: Battle Rounds 2,3,4

details.label: Detalle 4
details.text: Onslaught

details.label: Detalle 5
details.text: Battle Round 2,3,4,5

details.label: Detalle 6
details.text: Poxwalkers unit from your army gain the Battleline keyword.

death lords chosen.name: Deadly Vectors
death lords chosen.timing: In your opponent's Command phase, roll 2D6 for each Afflicted enemy unit, subtracting 1 from the result if that unit is Below Half-strength. If the result is 6 or less, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.
death lords chosen.effect: In your opponent's Command phase, roll 2D6 for each Afflicted enemy unit, subtracting 1 from the result if that unit is Below Half-strength. If the result is 6 or less, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

mortarions hammer.name: Miasmic Bombardment
mortarions hammer.timing: At the start of the battle round, select a number of enemy units more than 12" away from every model in your army that is on the battle field. Until the end of the battle round, those enemy units are Afflicted. The maximum number of units you can select in this way depends on the battle size, as shown below.

details.label: Detalle 1
details.text: Strike Force

details.label: Detalle 2
details.text: Onslaught

champions of contagion.name: Manifold Maladies
champions of contagion.timing: At the start of the battle round, you can select one of the Plagues listed in Nurgle's Gift. Until the end of the battle, that is your chosen Plague instead of any previously chosen Plague.
champions of contagion.effect: At the start of the battle round, you can select one of the Plagues listed in Nurgle's Gift. Until the end of the battle, that is your chosen Plague instead of any previously chosen Plague.

tallyband summoners.name: Reverberant Rancidity
tallyband summoners.timing: While a Plague Legions unit from your army is within 7" of one or more Death Guard units from your army, that Plague Legions unit has the Nurgle's Gift ability.
tallyband summoners.effect: While a Death Guard unit from your army is within 7" of one or more Plague Legions units from your army, add 3" to that Death Guard unit's Contagion Range.

slaaneshs chosen.name: Internal Rivalries
slaaneshs chosen.timing: At the start of the battle, your Warlord's unit is your army's Favoured Champions. The first time in each player's turn that an Emperor's Children Character unit from your army destroys an enemy unit, after resolving all of its attacks, that Character unit becomes your army's Favoured Champions, replacing the old one.
slaaneshs chosen.effect: Emperor's Children Character units from your army can ignore any or all modifiers to their Move characteristic and any or all modifiers to Advance and Charge rolls made for them.

details.label: Detalle 1
details.text: Each time a model in your army's Favoured Champions unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

peerless bladesmen.name: Exquisite Swordsmanship
peerless bladesmen.timing: Each time an Emperor's Children unit from your army is selected to fight, if it made a Charge move this turn, select one of the abilities below. While resolving those attacks, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the ability:

details.label: Detalle 1
details.text: [Sustained Hits 1]

rapid evisceration.name: Mechanised Murder
rapid evisceration.timing: Each time an Emperor's Children model from your army makes an attack, if it is a Transport model or disembarked from a Transport this turn, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.
rapid evisceration.effect: Each time an Emperor's Children model from your army makes an attack, if it is a Transport model or disembarked from a Transport this turn, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

coterie of the conceited.name: Pledges to the Dark Prince
coterie of the conceited.timing: At the start of the battle round, if your Warlord is on the battlefield, you must pledge a number to Slaanesh representing how many enemy units will be destroyed this battle round. At the end of the battle round, if the number of enemy units destroyed this battle round is greater than or equal to your pledge, you gain a number of Pact points equal to your pledge. Otherwise, you do not gain any Pact points this battle round and your Warlord model suffers D3 mortal wounds.
coterie of the conceited.effect: Emperor's Children units from your army gain a bonus depending on how many Pact points you have gained during the battle, as shown below (these are all cumulative).

details.label: Detalle 1
details.text: 1+: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

details.label: Detalle 2
details.text: 3+: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

details.label: Detalle 3
details.text: 5+: Melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [Lethal Hits] and [Sustained Hits 1]] abilities.

details.label: Detalle 4
details.text: 7+: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, a Critical Hit is scored on an unmodified Hit roll of 5+.

mercurial host.name: Quicksilver Grace
mercurial host.effect: You can re-roll Advance rolls made for Emperor's Children units from your army.

carnival of excess.name: Daemonic Empowerment
carnival of excess.timing: - While an Emperor's Children unit from your army is within 6" of one or more friendly Legions of Excess units, it is Empowered.
carnival of excess.effect: While a Legions of Excess unit from your army is within 6" of one or more friendly Emperor's Children units, it is Empowered.

details.label: Detalle 1
details.text: While a unit from your army is Empowered, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [Sustained Hits 1] ability. If such a weapon already has that ability, each time an attack is made with that weapon, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

court of the phoenician.name: Sensational Performance
court of the phoenician.timing: Sensational Performance: Each time this unit is selected to fight, if this unit made a Charge move this turn, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase:
court of the phoenician.effect: Emperor's Children units from your army have the following ability:

details.label: Detalle 1
details.text: This unit cannot target a unit it was within Engagement Range of at the start of the turn.

details.label: Detalle 2
details.text: This unit cannot target a unit that was the target of another unit's attack this phase.

details.label: Detalle 3
details.text: Improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of this unit's melee weapons by 1.

hexwarp thrallband.name: Flow of Magic
hexwarp thrallband.timing: Certain areas of the battlefield are within your army's Flow of Magic, as follows:
hexwarp thrallband.effect: Your deployment zone is always within your army's Flow of Magic.

details.label: Detalle 1
details.text: At the start of any phase, if you control at least half of the objective markers within No Man's Land, until the end of that phase, No Man's Land is within your army's Flow of Magic.

details.label: Detalle 2
details.text: At the start of any phase, if you control at least half of the objective markers within your opponent's deployment zone, until the end of that phase, your opponent's deployment zone is within your army's Flow of Magic.

details.label: Detalle 3
details.text: Each time a Thousand Sons model from your army makes a Psychic Attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If such a model is wholly within your army's Flow of Magic, each time it makes a Psychic Attack, add 1 to the Wound roll instead.

grand coven.name: Kindred Sorcery
grand coven.timing: In your Command phase, you can select one of the abilities listed below to take effect until the start of your next Command phase. You can only select each of these abilities once per battle.

details.label: Detalle 1
details.text: Add 6" to the range characteristic of ranged Psychic weapons equipped by Thousand Sons models in your army.

details.label: Detalle 2
details.text: Psychic Maelstrom

details.label: Detalle 3
details.text: Each time a Thousand Sons model from your army makes an attack with a Psychic weapon, add 1 to the Wound roll.

details.label: Detalle 4
details.text: Wrath of the Immaterium

details.label: Psychic Weapons Equipped By Thousand Sons Models In Your Army Have The
details.text: Psychic weapons equipped by Thousand Sons models in your army have the [Devastating Wounds] ability.

changehost of deceit.name: Infernal Pacts
changehost of deceit.timing: Daemonic Illusions (Aura): While a friendly Thousand Sons Psyker unit is within 6" of and visible to this unit, models in that unit have a 4+ invulnerable save against ranged attacks.
changehost of deceit.effect: Scintillating Legions units from your army have the following ability:

details.label: Detalle 1
details.text: Thousand Sons units from your army have the following ability:

details.label: Mortal Sorcery (Aura)
details.text: Mortal Sorcery (Aura): While a friendly Scintillating Legions Psyker unit from your army is within 6" of and visible to this unit, that Scintillating Legions unit has the Cabal of Sorcerers ability.

warpmeld pact.name: Warpmeld Sacrifice

If that charge is successful, your unit does not receive any Charge bonus this turn.

In addition, at the end of your Command phase, if one or more ATALAN JACKALS units from your army are within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent's Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

brood brother auxilia.name: Brood Brothers
brood brother auxilia.timing: You can include Astra Militarum units in your army, even though they do not have the Genestealer Cult Faction keyword. The combined points cost of such units you can include in your army is:

details.label: Strike Force
details.text: Strike Force: Up to 1000 pts

details.label: Onslaught
details.text: Onslaught: Up to 1500 pts

details.label: Detalle 3
details.text: A Genestealer Cult model must be your Warlord, and Astra Militarum models from your army lose the Voice of Command ability if they have it. You cannot include units with any of the following keywords in your army using this rule: Aircraft; Commisar; Epic Hero; Militarum Tempestus; Ogryn; Ratling; Tech-Priest Enginseer; Ministorum Priest.

final day.name: Psionic Parasitism
final day.timing: At the end of your Movement phase, for each TYRANIDS SYNAPSE unit from your army, you can select one friendly GENESTEALER CULTS unit (excluding PURESTRAIN GENESTEALER and PATRIARCH units) and one friendly TYRANIDS unit each within 9" of and visible to that SYNAPSE unit. If you do, that GENESTEALER CULTS unit from your army suffers D3+1 mortal wounds and one model in the selected TYRANIDS unit regains up to that many lost wounds and until the start of your next Movement phase, each time a model in the selected TYRANIDS unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.
final day.effect: TYRANIDS units from your army have the following ability:

details.label: Catalyst (Aura)
details.text: Catalyst (Aura): While an enemy unit is within 6" of this unit, each time a friendly GENESTEALER CULTS unit makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, add 1 to the Hit roll.

cult unveiled.name: Forming Boarding Squads
cult unveiled.effect: Do not split Neophyte Hybrids into separate units in the Form Boarding Squads step.

genespawn onslaught.name: Blessed Visages
genespawn onslaught.timing: Each time an enemy unit declares a charge that targets one or more Genestealer Cults units from your army, that enemy unit must take a Leadership test. If failed, until the end of the turn, each time a model in that enemy unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
genespawn onslaught.effect: Each time an enemy unit declares a charge that targets one or more Genestealer Cults units from your army, that enemy unit must take a Leadership test. If failed, until the end of the turn, each time a model in that enemy unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

war horde.name: Get Stuck In
war horde.effect: Melee weapons equipped by Orks models from your army have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

da big hunt.name: Da Hunt Is On
da big hunt.timing: At the start of your Command phase, select one Monster, Vehicle, or Character unit from your opponent's army. Until the start of your next Command phase, that enemy unit is your Prey:
da big hunt.effect: Each time a Beast Snagga unit from your army declares a charge that includes your Prey as one of the targets, you can re-roll the Charge roll.

details.label: Detalle 1
details.text: Each time a Beast Snagga model from your army makes an attack that targets your Prey, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

dread mob.name: Try Dat Button!
dread mob.timing: Each time a Mek, Orks Walker or Grots Vehicle unit from your army is selected to shoot or fight, roll one D6. Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the corresponding ability shown in the table below.
dread mob.effect: Alternatively, when such a unit is selected to shoot or fight, you can select one of the abilities above instead of rolling the D6. If you do, until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [HAZARDOUS]* ability as well.

details.label: If A Weapon Equipped By A Model You Army Has The
details.text: If a weapon equipped by a model you army has the [HAZARDOUS] ability from multiple sources, each time you take a Hazardous test for that weapon, it is failed on a roll of a 1 or a 2.

details.label: Detalle 2
details.text: Gretchin units from your army gain the Battleline keyword.

green tide.name: Mob Mentality
green tide.timing: Each time an attack targets a Boyz unit from your army, models in that unit have a 6+ invulnerable save against that attack. Each time an attack targets a Boyz unit from your army that contains 10 or more models, models in that unit have a 5+ invulnerable save against that attack.
green tide.effect: Each time an attack targets a Boyz unit from your army, models in that unit have a 6+ invulnerable save against that attack. Each time an attack targets a Boyz unit from your army that contains 10 or more models, models in that unit have a 5+ invulnerable save against that attack.

bully boyz.name: Da Boss Is Watchin'
bully boyz.timing: At the start of your Command phase, in a turn in which you have not called a Waaagh!, if you have one or more Warboss models on the battlefield (or embarked within a Transport that is on the battlefield), you can call a Waaagh! for a second time this battle. When doing so, that second Waaagh! only counts as having been called for Warboss, Nobz and Meganobz units from your army.
bully boyz.effect: At the start of your Command phase, in a turn in which you have not called a Waaagh!, if you have one or more Warboss models on the battlefield (or embarked within a Transport that is on the battlefield), you can call a Waaagh! for a second time this battle. When doing so, that second Waaagh! only counts as having been called for Warboss, Nobz and Meganobz units from your army.

kult of speed.name: Adrenaline Junkies
kult of speed.effect: Speed Freeks units from your army are eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which they Advanced or Fell Back.

taktikal brigade.name: Lissen 'Ere
taktikal brigade.timing: Once per battle round, in your Command phase or after being set up on the battlefield in your Movement phase, each Boss Snikrot, Mek and Warboss model in your army can issue Taktiks abilities.
taktikal brigade.effect: To do so, select one of the Taktiks abilities below and select one friendly Orks unit within 6" of that model to issue them to. That model must take a Leadership test: if failed, the selected unit suffers 1 mortal wound. Until the start of your next Command phase, the selected unit is affected by the selected Taktik. A unit cannot have Taktiks issued to it in this way more than once per battle round.

details.label: Detalle 1
details.text: Taktiks abilities cannot be issued to Battle shocked units, and if a unit affected by Taktiks becomes Battle shocked, all Taktiks cease to affect that unit while it is Battle shocked.

details.label: Get Stuck In
details.text: Get Stuck In: You can re roll Charge rolls made for this unit.

details.label: Get On Wiv It
details.text: Get On Wiv It: Add 1 to the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in this unit.

details.label: Sneaky Stalkin'
details.text: Sneaky Stalkin': Infantry and Mounted models (excluding Meganobz) in this unit have the Stealth ability and each time a ranged attack targets this unit, those models have the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

details.label: Shoota Drills
details.text: Shoota Drills: Each time an Infantry or Mounted model in this unit makes a ranged attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

more dakka.name: Dakka! Dakka! Dakka!
more dakka.timing: While the Waaagh! is active for your army, during your Shooting phase, ranged weapons equipped by Orks Infantry and Orks Walker models from your army have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.
more dakka.effect: Ranged weapons equipped by Orks Infantry and Orks Walker models from your army have the [ASSAULT] ability.

freebooter krew.name: Here Be Loot
freebooter krew.timing: At the start of your Command phase, select one objective marker. Until the start of your next Command phase, that objective marker is your loot objective.
freebooter krew.effect: Each time a model in an Orks Infantry, Orks Mounted or Orks Walker unit from your army makes an attack, that attack has the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability if either or both of the following are true:

details.label: Detalle 1
details.text: That model's unit is within range of your loot objective.

details.label: Detalle 2
details.text: That attack targets a unit within range of your loot objective.

ramship raiders.name: Forming Boarding Squads
ramship raiders.timing: When splitting a Kommandos unit, select on of the resulting Boarding Squads to gain the Distraction Grot token (if equipped with one). The Boarding Squad without the Distraction Grot token loses the Distraction Grot ability.
ramship raiders.effect: - Do not split Gretchin units into separate units in the Form Boarding Squads step.

kaptin killers.name: Comin' Through
kaptin killers.timing: In your Movement phase, Desperate Escape tests taken for Orks models from your army are automatically passed and each time an Orks unit from your army makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move through other models as if they were not there, provided those other models have a lower Toughness characteristic than it.
kaptin killers.effect: In your Movement phase, Desperate Escape tests taken for Orks models from your army are automatically passed and each time an Orks unit from your army makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move through other models as if they were not there, provided those other models have a lower Toughness characteristic than it.

speedwaaagh.name: Turbo Boostas
speedwaaagh.timing: Each time a Speed Freeks or Trukk unit (excluding Aircraft) from your army Advances, it can use its turbo. If it does, do not make an Advance roll for it; instead, until the end of the phase, models in that unit have a Move characteristic of 24" but can only move in one straight line, and until the end of the turn, ranged weapons equipped by those models have the [ASSAULT] ability and that unit cannot declare a charge.
speedwaaagh.effect: Designer's Note: *When a unit uses its turbo, the models in that unit cannot pivot, and they cannot make a move of two or more straight lines (e.g. to navigate around obstacles). That unit also cannot declare a charge, even if another rule would let it declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.*

blitz brigade.name: Eager For The Fight
blitz brigade.timing: Each time an Orks unit from your army disembarks from a Transport, until the end of the turn, you can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for that Orks unit.
blitz brigade.effect: Each time an Orks unit from your army disembarks from a Transport, until the end of the turn, you can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for that Orks unit.

kauyon.name: Patient Hunter
kauyon.timing: During the third, fourth, and fifth battle rounds, ranged weapons equipped by T'au Empire models from your army have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. During the third, fourth and fifth battle rounds, while a unit is a Guided unit (see For the Greater Good), each time a ranged attack is made by a model in that unit that targets a Spotted unit, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack's Ballistic skill characteristics and/or all modifiers to the Hit roll.
kauyon.effect: During the third, fourth, and fifth battle rounds, ranged weapons equipped by T'au Empire models from your army have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. During the third, fourth and fifth battle rounds, while a unit is a Guided unit (see For the Greater Good), each time a ranged attack is made by a model in that unit that targets a Spotted unit, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack's Ballistic skill characteristics and/or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

montka.name: Killing Blow
montka.timing: During the first, second and third battle rounds, ranged weapons equipped by T'au Empire models from your army have the [ASSAULT] ability. During the first, second and third battle rounds, while a unit is a Guided unit (see For the Greater Good), its ranged weapons have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.
montka.effect: During the first, second and third battle rounds, ranged weapons equipped by T'au Empire models from your army have the [ASSAULT] ability. During the first, second and third battle rounds, while a unit is a Guided unit (see For the Greater Good), its ranged weapons have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

retaliation cadre.name: Bonded Heroes
retaliation cadre.timing: Each time a T'au Empire Battlesuit model from your army makes a ranged attack that targets a unit within 12", improve the Strength characteristic of that attack by 1. If that attack targets a unit within 9", improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1 as well.
retaliation cadre.effect: Each time a T'au Empire Battlesuit model from your army makes a ranged attack that targets a unit within 12", improve the Strength characteristic of that attack by 1. If that attack targets a unit within 9", improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1 as well.

kroot hunting pack.name: Hunter's Instincts
kroot hunting pack.timing: Each time a Kroot model from your army makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll if the target of that attack is below its Starting Strength, and add 1 to the Wound roll as well if the target of that attack is Below Half-strength.
kroot hunting pack.effect: Each time a Kroot model from your army makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll if the target of that attack is below its Starting Strength, and add 1 to the Wound roll as well if the target of that attack is Below Half-strength.

auxiliary cadre.name: Integrated Command Structure
auxiliary cadre.timing: Targeting Triangulation (Aura): While an enemy unit is within 9" of and visible to this unit, each time a ranged attack made by a friendly T'au Empire model (excluding Kroot, Vespid Stingwings and TITANIC models) targets that enemy unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.
auxiliary cadre.effect: Kroot and Vespid Stingwings units from your army have the following ability:

details.label: Detalle 1
details.text: T'au Empire units (excluding Kroot and Vespid Stingwings units) from your army have the following ability:

details.label: Localised Stealth Projectors (Aura)
details.text: Localised Stealth Projectors (Aura): While a friendly Kroot or Vespid Stingwings unit is wholly within 6" of and visible to this unit, that Kroot or Vespid Stingwings unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

experimental prototype cadre.name: Superior Craftmanship
experimental prototype cadre.effect: Add 6" to the Range characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by T'au Empire models from your army.

kroot raiding party.name: Guerrilla Ambushers
kroot raiding party.timing: Each time an enemy unit is selected to fire Overwatch, roll one D6: on a 4+, until the end of the turn, that unit cannot make Overwatch attacks that target Kroot units from your army.
kroot raiding party.effect: Each time an enemy unit is selected to fire Overwatch, roll one D6: on a 4+, until the end of the turn, that unit cannot make Overwatch attacks that target Kroot units from your army.

starfire cadre.name: Markerlight Precision
starfire cadre.timing: Each time a T'au Empire unit from your army (excluding Kroot units) is selected to shoot, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have their Ballistic Skill characteristic improved by 1 and have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability while targeting an enemy unit that is visible to one or more friendly Markerlight units that are not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy models.
starfire cadre.effect: Each time a T'au Empire unit from your army (excluding Kroot units) is selected to shoot, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have their Ballistic Skill characteristic improved by 1 and have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability while targeting an enemy unit that is visible to one or more friendly Markerlight units that are not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy models.
